title: Stir Fried Aubergine with Canadian Skillet Seared Flavorful Meat
description: A flavorful Chinese dish featuring seared Canadian meat and stir-fried aubergine, served sizzling in a hot skillet.
instructions: 1. Cut the aubergine into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
2. Cut the Canadian beef into thin strips and set aside.
3. In a large skillet or wok, heat 2 tbsp of Canadian skillet oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add the beef strips and sear until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
6. In the same skillet, add the soy sauce, cooking wine, and cornstarch. Stir until the cornstarch is dissolved.
7. Add the aubergine to the skillet and stir-fry until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
8. Return the beef to the skillet and stir-fry until coated with the sauce.
9. Season with black pepper and salt to taste.
10. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve hot.
